Notice And Motion For Appointment Fo A Receiver And To Appoint Arthur N. Harris As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Appointment of A Receiver And To Appoint Arthur N. Harris As Receiver IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
